title: Truth Detectives: AI vs. Fake News
synopsis: Step into a breaking news crisis where AI-generated stories are spreading fast â and you're the only one who can figure out what's real. Through choices that have real consequences inside the story, you'll learn exactly how AI creates and spreads misinformation, and build the skills to stop it.
rationale: Pre-teens are among the heaviest sharers of viral content yet receive almost no structured education on how AI systems generate and amplify misinformation at scale.
learning_outcome: Students can identify AI-generated misinformation using a self-built checklist, and make and defend a reasoned judgment about whether a piece of content is trustworthy.
